indications.text:
ILUVIEN® (fluocinolone acetonide intravitreal implant) 0.19 mg is indicated for the treatment of diabetic macular edema in patients
who have been previously treated with a course of corticosteroids and did not have a clinically significant rise in intraocular pressure.

1.1 Diabetic Macular Edema
ILUVIEN® is indicated for the treatment of diabetic macular edema (DME) in patients who have been previously treated with a course
of corticosteroids and did not have a clinically significant rise in intraocular pressure.
1.2 Chronic Non-Infectious Uveitis Affecting the Po...

ILUVIEN® (fluocinolone acetonide intravitreal implant) 0.19 mg is indicated for the treatment of diabetic macular
edema (DME) in patients who have been previously treated with a course of corticosteroids and did not have a
clinically significant rise in intraocular pressure.
